ddls:
CREATE TABLE "covid_cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case record */,
  "province_state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the province or state where the case is reported */,
  "country_region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country or region where the case is reported */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was last updated */,
  "confirmed" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths */,
  "recovered" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the case is reported (if applicable) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the case location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the case location */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city or region where the case is reported */,
  "case_age" INTEGER /* Age of the case (if applicable) */,
  "case_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the case (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_cases_province_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_state_id") REFERENCES provinces_states ("province_state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_cases_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_cases_country_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_region_id") REFERENCES countries_regions ("country_region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_cases_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES case_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provinces_states" (
  "province_state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each province or state */,
  "province_state_name" TEXT /* Name of the province or state */,
  "country_region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country or region where the province or state is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the province/state */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the province/state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the province/state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("province_state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries_regions" (
  "country_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country or region */,
  "country_region_name" TEXT /* Name of the country or region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the country/region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the country/region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country/region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "province_state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province or state where the city is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update event */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case record being updated */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the update occurred */,
  "confirmed_change" INTEGER /* Change in the number of confirmed cases */,
  "deaths_change" INTEGER /* Change in the number of deaths */,
  "recovered_change" INTEGER /* Change in the number of recovered cases */,
  "update_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source for the update */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_updates_update_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("update_source_id") REFERENCES case_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_updates_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES covid_cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., government, university, NGO) */,
  "reliability_score" REAL /* Reliability score of the data source (0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report's findings */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., global, regional, national) */,
  "data_source_ids" TEXT /* IDs of the data sources used in the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, health official, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or affiliation of the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string of user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the case record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the case record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES covid_cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case record for this version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when this version was created */,
  "data" TEXT /* JSON string of the data for this version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the version */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES covid_cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
